## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Dave Capone to explore a potential senior role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dave has extensive experience in SEO, e-commerce, and content strategy across major platforms (Fanatics, Red Ventures, TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [fwd.digital is closing a $12M Series A, building AI-powered content workflows for rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Role discussed: Managing Director, overseeing 10-16 accounts, managing teams, and product development](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Compensation in $200k range + equity discussed; follow-up meeting scheduled for next day](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

## Topics

### Dave's Background and Experience

  - [Started in tech sales, transitioned to SEO and e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Built Fanatics' SEO to $300M business, managing 330+ websites](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Worked at Red Ventures, Job Case, and currently at TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Passionate about building, problem-solving, and taking calculated risks](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Experienced in AI applications, particularly at TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### fwd.digital Overview

  - [Founded by ex-Zapier head of engineering/product](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Platform for building and managing AI workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Started with editorial content, expanded to programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Grew from services to tech company due to scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows for various business processes, including hiring](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Potential Role at fwd.digital

  - [Title: Managing Director](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Responsibilities: Product development, managing 2 "pods" (3-5 people each)](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Overseeing 10-16 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Client-facing and internal improvement focus](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Equity, bonus, and base salary within Dave's $200k+ range](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Marcel's Background

  - [Experience at IBM, HP building successful content programs](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [CMO at DeepGram, 24x'd traffic in 3 months using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Built newsletter with 300k subscribers, driving company growth](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for 12:30 PM Pacific the next day](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Dave to prepare questions and do additional research on fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more detailed job description and role specifics](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Discuss compensation structure, including equity and bonus details](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
